overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk food stall interior in a game engine, featuring neon-lit digital menus, industrial piping, and detailed examination of decorative shelf items including maneki-neko figurines and a bronze guardian lion statue.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk food stall counter with a red heated display case containing burgers and fries. A woman in a blue dress stands to the left using a handheld device, looks up briefly, then walks away as the camera begins moving forward past neon-lit digital menu boards.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the food display case into a narrow corridor lined with industrial piping overhead and digital menu boards on wooden posts. Cardboard boxes line the left wall as the space transitions into a back storage area with a distant counter visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage corridor with metal shelving units

ceramic vases and containers arranged on the metal shelves

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the back storage area, the camera passes metal shelving units filled with ceramic vases and storage containers. The space is characterized by exposed industrial piping overhead and a narrow concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage shelf with maneki-neko figurines and guardian lion statue

close-up focus on the bronze guardian lion statue

agents.ego_description: slowing down to examine the decorative items on the shelf, focusing on the maneki-neko cats and lion statue

entered.detail: row of white ceramic lucky cat figurines with red collars and waving paws
large detailed bronze guardian lion statue with intricate carvings

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and focuses on a metal shelf displaying a collection of white maneki-neko figurines and a prominent bronze guardian lion statue. The movement slows to examine these decorative items in detail, ending with a close-up of the intricately carved bronze lion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant cyberpunk food stall into the cluttered depths of its industrial storage area. It begins at a service counter featuring a red heated display case of burgers and fries, moving forward past neon-lit digital menus as a woman in a blue dress departs the scene. As the camera pushes further, the open storefront narrows into a corridor defined by overhead industrial piping and wooden menu posts, transitioning past cardboard boxes into a back storage zone. The scene then shifts deeper into this concrete space, gliding past metal shelving units filled with ceramic vases and containers. Finally, the movement slows to focus on a collection of white maneki-neko figurines before settling into a detailed close-up of an intricately carved bronze guardian lion statue.
